LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATI0N, INC DBA GREAT WESTERN MOTION TO VACATE THE ORDER GRANTING RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED: GRANTED. THE COURT LACKED JURISDICTION TO VACATE THE DEFAULT ON JANUARY 6, 2010 BECAUSE DEFENDANT FILED FOR BANKRUPTCY PRIOR TO THAT TIME. ACCORDINGLY, THE JANUARY 6, 2010 ORDER IS VOID AND IS VACATED PER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 473(D). THE SIX MONTH DEADLINE DOES NOT APPLY TO A VOID ORDER. THE COURT ALSO STRIKES THE ANSWER FILED ON JANUARY 6, 2010. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SIDDIQ, SIMIN

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS GRANTED. CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION HAS ESTABLISHED THE FOLLOWING" (1) THE CLAIM UPON WHICH THE ATTACHMENT IS BASED IS ONE UPON WHICH AN ATTACHMENT MAY BE ISSUED; (2) THE PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF THE CLAIM UPON WHICH THE ATTACHMENT IS BASED; (3) THE ATTACHMENT IS NOT SOUGHT FOR A PURPOSE OTHER THAN THE RECOVERY ON THE CLAIM UPON WHICH THE ATTACHMENT IS BASED; AND (4) THE AMOUNT TO BE SECURED BY THE ATTACHMENT IS GREATER THAN ZERO. (CCP 484.090.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET ITS BURDEN TO SHOW THAT THE JUDGMENT WOULD BE MADE UNAVAILABLE TO LEVY BY OTHER THAN CONCEALMENT OR IMPAIRMENT IN VALUE. ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ADEQUATELY DESCRIBED THE PROPERTY OF A NATURAL PERSON SUBJECT TO ATTACHMENT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

DEFENDANT SIMIN SIDDIQ'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 473.5. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT SHE LACKED ACTUAL NOTICE OF THIS SUIT. THIS MOTION IS TIMELY MADE BECAUSE THIS ACTION WAS STAYED FROM DECEMBER 31, 2009 UNTIL AUGUST 4, 2011 DURING THE PENDENCY OF DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY ACTION. THE COURT ALSO GRANTED THE RETURN OF FUNDS GARNISHED BY THE PLAINTIFF FROM THE DEFENDANT. 2 ORDERS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Associati0n,Inc Dba Great Western Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc. Dba Great Western Collection Bureau's Application For Right To Attach Order and For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is granted. Creditors Trade Association has established the following" (1) The claim upon which the attachment is based is one upon which an attachment may be issued; (2) The plaintiff has established the probable validity of the claim upon which the attachment is based; (3) The attachment is not sought for a purpose other than the recovery on the claim upon which the attachment is based; and (4) The amount to be secured by the attachment is greater than zero. (CCP 484.090.) Order signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DOUGLAS B. PROVENCHER OF THE PROVENCHER & FLATT LLP,
TEL. NO. (707) 284-2380 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. JOHANNA KWASNIEWSKI, TEL. NO. (510) 214-6414 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THE FORM OF ORDER. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SIMIN SIDDIQ'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT is Granted pursuant to CCP 473.5. Defendant has shown that she lacked actual notice of this suit. This motion is timely made because this action was stayed from December 31, 2009 until August 4, 2011 during the pendency of Defendant's bankruptcy action. The court also granted the return of funds garnished by the Plaintiff from the Defendant. 2 ORDERS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate The Order Granting Relief From Default And Default Judgment; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Law Office, 415-922-5939, for Plaintiff and moving party

No other Appearance. The Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATI0N, INC DBA GREAT WESTERN Motion To Vacate The Order Granting Relief From Default And Default Judgment.
Granted. The Court lacked jurisdiction to vacate the default on January 6, 2010 because defendant filed for bankruptcy prior to that time. Accordingly, the January 6, 2010 order is void and is vacated per Code of Civil Procedure 473(d). The six month deadline does not apply to a void order. The Court also strikes the answer filed on January 6, 2010. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Ex Parte Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Atty. specially appearing for Creditors Trade
Simin Siddig, Judgment Debtor

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Ex Parte Application For Writ Of Attachment is denied. Plaintiff has not met its burden to show that the judgment would be made unavailable to levy by other than concealment or impairment in value. Additionally, Plaintiff has not adequately described the property of a natural person subject to attachment. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
